---
title: "Language model-guided anticipation and discovery of mammalian metabolites"
author: 
- Qiang
- Wang
- Lu
- et al.
publication: "Nature, **651**, 211–220 (2026)"
categories: 
  - external-publication
  - medicinal-chemistry
  - artificial-intelligence
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-025-09969-x
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nature"
issue: 651
page: 211–220
year: 2026
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/s41586-025-09969-x
---
